title: Evangelion jo
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion jo Post by Soljer13 » Sat Jun 06, 2009 2:40 pm HAI GUYS IM BACK cough cough. anyway. A new evagame has been released for PS2 and PSP Consoles! Evangelion Jo(jo= begining). Promises to be the best eva game yet, features timed action sequences(ala god of war) customizable evangelion, and customizable battlefields. The game is based heavily at the start on Rebuild 1.0, going as far as to the defeat of Ramiel, where fter the games switches back to the original series. The game has a steep learning curve, unforgiving, unskippable gameover sequence, and all in all is less adventurous than evangelions 2. Action kinda reminds you of ye' ol' eva 64(still the best action eva game ever). some screens: To PSP Pirates, Sadly you guys cant play this game. The UMD comes with a firmware security update that requires your psp be on Official Firmware 5.05 or up. This cannot be workaround, spoofed or hacked. To all thse who actually bought tha game(me included[wow thats a change]) congrats! as of now I just beat Israfel(f****** hard) and have yet to see any cameos or sneak peeks at REBUILD 2. oh well. I know for a fact that Kaworu will appear out of sync with the original series in this game(before), and he has some sort of key interaction with Shinji and Asuka. The PS2 version of the games is horribly slow to save load at the save screen, though that actually might be all my mem cards but im not sure for now, I'll post later if I find out.

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Sat Jun 06, 2009 4:24 pm Sounds great i'll have to order it. It looks awesome.

[]: Post by ZapX » Sat Jun 06, 2009 4:57 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6450 Look around before you start a new topic.

Article: Evangelion jo
[]: Evangelion jo Post by Soljer13 » Sat Jun 06, 2009 2:40 pm HAI GUYS IM BACK cough cough. anyway. A new evagame has been released for PS2 and PSP Consoles! Evangelion Jo(jo= begining). Promises to be the best eva game yet, features timed action sequences(ala god of war) customizable evangelion, and customizable battlefields. The game is based heavily at the start on Rebuild 1.0, going as far as to the defeat of Ramiel, where fter the games switches back to the original series. The game has a steep learning curve, unforgiving, unskippable gameover sequence, and all in all is less adventurous than evangelions 2. Action kinda reminds you of ye' ol' eva 64(still the best action eva game ever). some screens: To PSP Pirates, Sadly you guys cant play this game. The UMD comes with a firmware security update that requires your psp be on Official Firmware 5.05 or up. This cannot be workaround, spoofed or hacked. To all thse who actually bought tha game(me included[wow thats a change]) congrats! as of now I just beat Israfel(f****** hard) and have yet to see any cameos or sneak peeks at REBUILD 2. oh well. I know for a fact that Kaworu will appear out of sync with the original series in this game(before), and he has some sort of key interaction with Shinji and Asuka. The PS2 version of the games is horribly slow to save load at the save screen, though that actually might be all my mem cards but im not sure for now, I'll post later if I find out.
